markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discussing creator partnerships for a new AI SEO tool launch.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Tool Launch:** Growthx.ai is launching a free AI SEO tool, Checkthat, on Jan 28. Its hook is offering 100k+ prompts for free vs. competitors' \~$300/mo for 500 prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [**Launch Strategy:** The initial focus is driving awareness and sign-ups via X/LinkedIn amplification and dedicated creator posts. A \~$5-10k budget is allocated.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [**Long-Term Goal:** Develop an evergreen YouTube partnership model. The goal is co-creating content (e.g., workshops) with creators and paying them a recurring fee per member referred to the Growthx community.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Ori will deliver a curated Airtable list of potential creators for the launch and long-term partnerships by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2524.0)

## Topics

### New AI SEO Tool: Checkthat

  - [**Product:** Checkthat, a free AI SEO monitoring tool from Growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [**Hook:** Offers 100k+ prompts for free, directly challenging competitors who charge \~$300/mo for 500 prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [**Launch Goal:** Drive awareness and sign-ups, then onboard users into the Growthx community and educational content (courses, workshops).](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Launch Date:** Jan 28 (tentative, may shift by one week).](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)

### Launch Campaign Strategy

  - [**Budget:** \~$5-10k, with potential to increase based on the proposed plan.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [**Phase 1: Amplification (\~$5k)**](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
      - [Creators amplify Growthx's main launch post on X and LinkedIn.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
      - [Ori noted this is a standard, effective tactic for launches.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [**Phase 2: Dedicated Posts (Variable Cost)**](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
      - [Creators publish original posts about Checkthat.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
      - [Jason requested a creator list before committing to this phase.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [**Phase 3: YouTube (Variable Cost)**](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
      - [**Mid-Roll Ads:** Integrations in larger channels (100k+ subs) for \~$1k+ each.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
      - **Dedicated Videos:** Full videos from smaller creators (\<100k subs) for \~$1k each.
      - [Jason is less interested in dedicated videos from high-volume, lower-quality channels like Julian Goldie.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)

### Long-Term YouTube Partnership Model

  - [**Goal:** Create an evergreen lead-gen channel via YouTube, moving beyond the "momentary" impact of LinkedIn workshops.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [**Proposed Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
      - [**Co-creation:** Growthx and a creator build a content asset (e.g., workshop, mini-course) hosted on the Growthx Circle community.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
      - [**Evergreen Promotion:** The creator promotes the asset across all their videos, including old ones.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
      - [**Payment:** A recurring fee per member referred to the community.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1973.0)
          - [**Community Details:** $200 joining fee + $30/mo subscription.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1973.0)
          - [**Proposed Payout:** A large portion of the joining fee ($200-300+) and/or a share of the recurring revenue for several months.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1973.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The model offers creators a passive, recurring revenue stream without the active work of managing their own community. It targets creators who haven't built a large, paid community (e.g., on Skool) or who want to monetize a business audience they can't serve directly.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ori:**](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2524.0)
      - [Deliver a curated Airtable list of potential creators by Monday (Jan 19).](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2524.0)
      - [The list will include options for:](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2536.0)
          - [X/LinkedIn amplification](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2536.0)
          - [Dedicated posts](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2536.0)
          - [Long-term YouTube partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2536.0)
      - [Set up a Slack channel for communication.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2587.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2524.0)
      - [Review the creator list to finalize the launch campaign package.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2524.0)
      - [Draft a Notion doc outlining the long-term YouTube partnership model.](https://fathom.video/share/3rMYs4xzA_aUE7izaHf8NhFNZqEqsbKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2169.0)
